body.body: Fix two display bugs in dashboard inference block. (1) Distinguish cloud_mode gate (ON/OFF) from cloud call fraction (%) — currently displayed adjacently with no label distinction. (2) Cap latency window at 24h wall-clock or exclude calls >60s from p95 display with a note — current n=20 rolling window has a Feb timeout skewing p95 to 186s. Size S. Find the dashboard stats assembly code first, read it fully, then fix.
body.title: Fix dashboard Cloud% label and p95 outlier (#247)
body.result: Fixed two display bugs: (1) Cloud% label now distinct from CloudMode ON/OFF gate — Performance line shows 'Cloud%: X%  CloudMode: ON/off'; (2) p95 latency now filters out samples >60s before computing — excluded count shown as dim note when nonzero. main.py render call updated to pass cloud_mode_active.
